name: sync-phone-marketplace
description: Distribution marketplace for sync-phone — iPhone voice capture to Obsidian vault pipeline for Claude Code.

plugins.name: sync-phone
plugins.description: Drain iPhone voice-dictation captures into LLM-curated Obsidian vaults. Summarizes raw dictation, routes by vault, archives, clears the inbox. Runs in both Claude Code and Codex CLI from a single source.
